findings.title: Authentication function 'login' does not produce audit logs
findings.message: Authentication function 'login' does not produce audit logs. Security-relevant events (login, logout, password reset) MUST be logged per OWASP A09:2021 and NIST AU-2.

findings.title: Exception caught but not logged in payment processing
findings.message: Exception caught but not logged. Silent error swallowing (CWE-390) prevents detection of security incidents.

findings.title: Password logged in authentication flow
findings.message: Sensitive data 'password' is being written to log output (CWE-532). Credentials MUST NOT appear in logs.

findings.title: Unsanitized request data in log statement
findings.message: Unsanitized user input from request object in log statement (CWE-117). Use structured logging or sanitize input.

findings.title: Rate limiting event not logged
findings.message: Rate limiting event not logged. When requests are throttled, log the event for security monitoring.
